name: Amadeus IT Group, S.A.
h1: Amadeus IT's GCC footprint in India
lede: Amadeus IT runs two centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Bengaluru, covering R&D, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amadeus IT office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amadeus IT Group, S.A. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amadeus IT runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru), covering R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Amadeus IT's India footprint covers Pune and Bengaluru, spanning R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 79 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Amadeus IT operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.a: Amadeus IT's India footprint includes Pune and 1 additional city.
